title: Fix public attorney directory API list/search endpoints
scope: Align attorney list query signature with route parameters to prevent 500s
Implement attorney search filtering to stop 500s on search requests
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/attorneys returns a success payload instead of HTTP 500 when offset is supplied
GET /api/attorneys/search returns a success payload instead of HTTP 500
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Search filtering uses lightweight text matching against JSON blobs and may be imprecise
rollback_plan: Revert the attorney model search/list changes and remove this workorder/changelog entry
